definitions: Flatworms that are parasitic in humans and other animals.
Unlikely strokes of luck or chance occurrences.
The broad, flattened end of a whale's tail.
The barb or point of an arrow or harpoon.
examples: The scientist studied various types of flukes.
Winning the lottery was one of life's flukes.
The whale's flukes propelled it through the water.
The harpoon's flukes were designed to hold fast.
